status_reason: The current S1 body and its rail/timber fit path depend on Templot reference data and unaccepted project assumptions. No independently evidenced production ChairDefinition exists.

owners.project-provenance-review: Select and verify independent evidence, permissions and field-level classifications.
owners.project-geometry-review: Specify the full-size ChairDefinition, rail/timber interfaces, derivations, tolerances and comparison oracle.
owners.project-owner: Accept the precise S1 prototype, evidence bundle, package licence, declared uses and non-copyright-rights review.

expected_value: Templot5 revision 556b dxf_unit.pas init_rail_section: C&L / EMGS / S4Soc Code 75 rev:A rail section
Templot5 revision 556b chairs_unit.pas init_2d_rea: REA S1 and S1J chair base dimensions
Templot5 revision 556b chairs_unit.pas init_3d_rea: chair edge, plinth, seat and jaw reference dimensions

expected_value.operator_label: Templot C&L / EMGS / S4Soc Code 75 bullhead rev:A

included: full-size base, seat and jaw geometry
package evidence, licence and release status
excluded: turnout-specific chair assignment and stationing except as legacy interface evidence
automatic conversion of arbitrary scans or CAD
Templot media or source data as canonical production input
scopes.later_gate: A versioned full-size S1 ChairDefinition, independently evidenced field by field, must reproduce every accepted constituent and rail interface, pass the frozen comparison oracle and strict package manifest, and receive project-owner acceptance.

entries.subject: Current S1 identity and chair-code mapping
entries.output_effect: Selects chair code 1 as an ordinary REA S1 body and controls which analytical positions can generate the current physical approximation.
entries.release_disposition: Retain this mapping only as legacy comparison evidence until an independent REA/LMS chair source establishes the precise prototype designation and constituent contract.
evidence_needed: Precise S1 prototype designation and period/application
Independent engineering or measured evidence for the S1 identity and interfaces

entries.subject: Current base and seat plan envelope
entries.output_effect: Defines the current rectangular base footprint and seat width used for fit, support and display.

observed_values.upstream_bibliographic_lead: Templot comment cites Standard Railway Equipment 1926; the project has not independently obtained or accepted that source

entries.release_disposition: Replace the provenance basis with independent full-size evidence; preserve the current values only as comparison expectations.
evidence_needed: Calibrated base outline including corner radii and fixing features
Nominal full-size datum from the rail gauge face
Uncertainty and tolerance for every accepted dimension

entries.subject: Current edge, plinth, seat and jaw heights
entries.output_effect: Controls the vertical envelope and rail seating height of the current five-box body.

observed_values.outer_jaw_top: derived from the current rail web-face height minus 1/32 prototype inch

entries.release_disposition: Re-establish the nominal vertical sections from independent chair and rail evidence, then derive interface heights transparently from those accepted inputs.
evidence_needed: Full-size sectional measurements or drawing datums
Accepted rail-seat inclination and rail-section interface
Independent confirmation of jaw top and web engagement

entries.subject: Current inner and outer jaw envelope
entries.output_effect: Defines rectangular jaw blocks and therefore the rail-foot gap and overall solid bounds.
entries.release_disposition: Do not refine the boxes into production geometry. Replace them with independently evidenced jaw profiles and named constituent builders.
evidence_needed: Inner solid/loose-jaw form and rail-web engagement
Outer-jaw ribs, slopes, fillets and transitions
Key, plug and socket geometry where applicable

entries.subject: Legacy five-box S1 body
entries.output_effect: Fuses edge, plinth, seat, inner-jaw and outer-jaw boxes into the current retained/export-preparation solid.
entries.release_disposition: Retain solely as B14/B15 behavioural and bounding-box evidence. It is not the production S1 ChairDefinition or exact geometry oracle.
evidence_needed: Complete constituent inventory
Procedural cross-sections and transitions
Frozen independent S1 assembly oracle and tolerances

entries.subject: Current prototype-inch to model-millimetre conversion
entries.output_effect: Bakes the fixed OO-scale divisor into current body dimensions before shape generation.
entries.release_disposition: Make the canonical ChairDefinition full-size and unit-explicit; move scale and manufacturing compensation to an export/manufacturing adapter.
evidence_needed: Accepted canonical full-size units and datum convention
Explicit scale/manufacturing adapter contract and round-trip tests

entries.subject: Independent S1 package evidence and rights record
entries.output_effect: Controls whether any future S1 definition or output can pass the project release gate.
entries.release_disposition: Select a rights-compatible independent evidence bundle, populate field-level provenance, complete the non-copyright review and obtain explicit project-owner acceptance.
evidence_needed: Calibrated measurement, scan, CAD or engineering drawing evidence with authority and hashes
Commercial, publication, adaptation and redistribution permission
Package licence and strict dependency-manifest pass

included: rail section used to define and validate the S1 interface
timber surface and width used to support the S1
chair placement frame and rail/timber fit transforms
manufacturing allowances and validation tolerances that can change accepted output
excluded: complete C10 turnout geometry and topology
legacy output families not required to qualify a standalone S1 package
scopes.later_gate: Every rail/timber input used by the S1 definition or its qualification fixture must be independently evidenced or an explicitly accepted project derivation; turnout-specific placement stays blocked under the other-S&C/legacy scopes until separately audited.

entries.subject: Current fixed C&L/EMGS/S4Soc Code 75 rev:A rail profile
entries.output_effect: Controls gauge-face datum, rail-foot gap, jaw heights and physical interference validation.
entries.release_disposition: Use this exact profile only for the frozen Templot/B14 comparison. Select and independently evidence the rail section supported by the production S1 package.
evidence_needed: Precise prototype or model rail-section designation
Independent cross-section dimensions and permitted source
Rail inclination and manufacturing tolerance

entries.subject: Derived head, foot and web-face profile values
entries.output_effect: Derives jaw top and fit surfaces from the fixed rail dimensions and fish angle.

observed_values.derivation: head/foot depth and web-face heights derived from the fixed profile

entries.release_disposition: Retain the transparent derivation method but recompute only from an independently evidenced rail profile.
evidence_needed: Accepted rail-profile inputs
Direct tests of every derived face and rail-seat interface

entries.subject: Current chair/rail/timber fit tolerances
entries.output_effect: Changes jaw clearance, chair acceptance, timber support findings and incompatible-rail rejection.
entries.release_disposition: Separate geometric truth, manufacturing allowance and numerical tolerance; justify and accept each value against measured fit and printer/process capability.
evidence_needed: Rail/chair fit measurements
Manufacturing-process capability and shrinkage evidence
Numerical robustness tests independent of production allowance

entries.subject: Current turnout timber, plain sleeper and length-step values
entries.output_effect: Controls support polygons, chair overhang findings and model-support widening.
entries.release_disposition: Independently evidence the timber/sleeper section used by the S1 qualification fixture; do not make turnout timbering a hidden chair-package constant.
evidence_needed: Prototype timber or sleeper dimensions for the selected application
Model/manufacturing timber definition and permitted evidence source

entries.subject: Current C10 timber stationing, length and rounding rules
entries.output_effect: Determines the support position and available footprint beneath every turnout S1 instance.

observed_values.scope: legacy C10 placement rather than reusable S1 package geometry

entries.release_disposition: Exclude C10 stationing from the standalone S1 package. Retain it as a local placement oracle and move its complete lineage to the other-S&C/legacy audit before qualifying full turnout output.
evidence_needed: Independent C10 timbering source before full turnout release
A minimal independently defined timber fixture for standalone S1 fit qualification

entries.subject: Current model-only timber widening policy
entries.output_effect: May widen the effective manufactured timber support beneath rotated chairs while leaving the recorded prototype width unchanged.
entries.release_disposition: Keep this as a separately versioned manufacturing policy, never a mutation of prototype truth; justify its limits and make its application explicit in output manifests.
evidence_needed: Manufacturing and structural rationale for the margin and limit
Operator acceptance of automatic versus explicit application
Export tests proving prototype and manufactured dimensions remain distinct

entries.subject: Current template-top and chair embed placement
entries.output_effect: Sets the generated chair base Z relative to a model template thickness and subtracts a fixed embed depth.

observed_values.placement: maximum configured/document template thickness minus embed depth

entries.release_disposition: Remove template-document Z from the full-size chair definition. Define timber-seat datum and manufacturing embed/socket treatment in the appropriate adapter.
evidence_needed: Canonical chair/timber contact datum
Manufacturing socket/embed contract and supported process
Round-trip placement tests

entries.subject: Current rail-tangent and gauge-normal placement transform
entries.output_effect: Rotates and positions each chair from a rail support point, local tangent and named gauge side.

observed_values.origin: chair centre on assigned rail support point
observed_values.local_y: perpendicular to local_x in the track plane
observed_values.gauge_side_source: named gauge/outer faces or connector offset sign

entries.release_disposition: Retain the transparent transform method after the canonical chair datum and independently evidenced rail interface are accepted; test both hands, orientations and change-back.
evidence_needed: Accepted chair-local coordinate frame
Rail gauge-face and seat datum
Mirroring/orientation and persistence oracle

entries.subject: Current chair-solid preparation versus future package/export gate
entries.output_effect: The legacy path can build a retained compound, but it cannot establish the evidence, package licence or output dependency status required for release.
entries.release_disposition: Keep B14/B15 solids as inspection/behavioural evidence. Wire the dependency manifest into the future package and transactional Validate/Export boundary before any positive release status.
evidence_needed: Accepted full-size S1 package and exact generator
Package and output dependency manifests
Transactional export, equivalence and reproducibility evidence
